scripts.format:check: pnpm exec prettier --check package.json README.md PRINCIPLES.md .github/workflows/development_pipeline.yml .github/workflows/README.md scripts/*.mjs apps/api/package.json
scripts.package:python: uv build --directory python/ade-engine && uv build --directory python/ade-config-template
scripts.test: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run build
